abstract: Indicates that the expectation is not intended to happen.
overview:
## Discussion

To check that a situation does *not* occur during testing, create an expectation that is fulfilled when the unexpected situation occurs, and set its [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestExpectation/isInverted] property to true. Your test will fail immediately if the inverted expectation is fulfilled.

# isInverted

**Instance Property**

Indicates that the expectation is not intended to happen.

## Declaration

```swift
var isInverted: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

To check that a situation does *not* occur during testing, create an expectation that is fulfilled when the unexpected situation occurs, and set its [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestExpectation/isInverted] property to true. Your test will fail immediately if the inverted expectation is fulfilled.
title: isInverted
